def positive_repository_returns_unexecuted_orm_query():
    rule_id = "repository_returns_unexecuted_orm_query"
    family = "architecture"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "Repository method returns a raw ORM query object instead of executing it and returning domain values."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
